# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('title', 'Comments')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-12 col-lg-9 mx-auto">
            <h2 class="mb-4">Comments</h2>

            @if(isset($comments) && $comments->count())
                <div class="comments-list">
                    @foreach($comments as $comment)
                        <article class="comment border rounded p-3 mb-3" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
                            <header class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-2">
                                <div class="comment-meta">
                                    <strong class="comment-author">
                                        {{ $comment->user->name ?? $comment->author_name ?? 'Anonymous' }}
                                    </strong>
                                    <span class="text-muted ms-2">
                                        <time datetime="{{ optional($comment->created_at)->toIso8601String() }}">
                                            {{ optional($comment->created_at)->diffForHumans() }}
                                        </time>
                                    </span>
                                </div>

                                @if(!empty($comment->website))
                                    <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="{{ $comment->website }}" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">
                                        Website
                                    </a>
                                @endif
                            </header>

                            <div class="comment-body">
                                {!! $comment->content !!}
                            </div>

                            @if(!empty($comment->updated_at) && $comment->updated_at->gt($comment->created_at))
                                <footer class="mt-2 text-muted small">
                                    Edited <time datetime="{{ $comment->updated_at->toIso8601String() }}">{{ $comment->updated_at->diffForHumans() }}</time>
                                </footer>
                            @endif
                        </article>
                    @endforeach
                </div>

                @if(method_exists($comments, 'links'))
                    <div class="mt-4">
                        {{ $comments->links() }}
                    </div>
                @endif
            @else
                <div class="alert alert-secondary mb-0">
                    No comments yet.
                </div>
            @endif
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
